title: The Internet Problem
content: During an online meeting, Ethan suddenly lost his internet connection. His computer screen froze, and everyone disappeared from the call. Ethan restarted the router several times, but nothing changed. Feeling frustrated, he contacted the internet company and waited on the phone for support. While waiting, he used mobile data to send messages to his coworkers explaining the situation. About an hour later, the connection finally returned. Ethan felt relieved because he still needed to finish an important project before the end of the day.
